docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FENDLER, PETER ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOWING INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL. CLAIM AND ORDER. 12/01/25 RETURN TO SENDER

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PETER ERIC FENDLER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY TOWING INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY FENDLER, PETER ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOWING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
